---
title: "Highlights"
format:
  docx:
    toc: false
---

**Highlights**

- Solo elderly rate did not predict BZ prescribing across 47 Japanese prefectures
- Aging rate was the sole significant predictor of BZ prescribing (6/6 specifications)
- BZ prescribing showed significant spatial clustering (Moran's I = 0.348, p = 0.003)
- Supply-side factors, not social isolation, likely drive geographic BZ disparities
- Deprescribing systems and physician education may reduce regional BZ variation
